rationale: The Project Maintainer accepts the normative M2 QueryRequest, QueryResult, Filter, Cursor, and Error/Warning contracts and their positive and negative conformance evidence. The completed M2 Query Contract Conformance Matrix authorizes M2.2 Verified Release Adapter work only. Subsequent implementation shall preserve these contracts unless a verified defect receives a controlled governance revision. This approval authorizes no ANN, release publication, biological claim, performance claim, SDK, REST, Explorer, or query-execution work.
